``` [RALPH] ✅ MISSION COMPLETE ``` ## Summary The plan **Add Welcome Landing Page with Under Construction Notice** is 100% complete and committed to `main` (commit `3cd3f0e`). ### Implemented - **`index.html`** — Semantic HTML5 landing page: `lang="en"`, viewport meta, `Hula — Coming Soon`, `
` with `

Welcome to Hula

`, and an under-construction `
` (🚧 icon, "Under Construction" heading, explanatory message). Includes the required HTML comment marking the replaceable section. No JavaScript, no external resources. - **`styles.css`** — CSS reset, centered flexbox layout, responsive relative units, and a distinct amber under-construction banner. - **`.github/workflows/pages.yml`** — GitHub Pages deploy workflow (checkout → configure-pages → upload-pages-artifact → deploy-pages) on push to `main`. ### Verification (all passing) | Check | Result | |-------|--------| | AC2 `

Welcome to Hula

` | ✓ | | AC3 under-construction notice with 🚧 | ✓ | | AC4 tab title `Hula — Coming Soon` | ✓ | | AC6 no JavaScript | ✓ | | AC7 no external resources | ✓ | | `lang="en"` + viewport meta | ✓ | | HTML parses cleanly (python `html.parser`) | ✓ | | CSS braces balanced (8 rules) | ✓ | | Stylesheet link resolves | ✓ | No project type-check/lint tooling exists (greenfield repo, no `package.json`), so verification was static syntax + acceptance-criteria checks — all green. ### Note (not a code blocker) - **AC8**: The Pages workflow is in place, but GitHub Pages must be **manually enabled once** by a repo admin (Settings → Pages → Source → "GitHub Actions"). This requires human access and cannot be done from code — recorded in the lessons file. Lessons file updated at `.hublaunch/lessons/a11_RALPH_LESSONS.md`.
